character.definition: a tally, like fitting the two halves of a tally, to petition the emperor that ..., to play music; to beat time
(ancient and corrupted form of 臺) a lookout, a tower, a terrace, a platform, a stage
a dry land in a river; an islet, tributary stream; an affluent stream
(same as 鬲) cooking utensil used in old times, sacrificial vessel; a heavy three-legged caldron; huge tripod of bronze with two ears
